title: sturmia minima
intro: Sturmia minima, a tropical plant native to Southeast Asia, is also known as the "Fever Plant" due to its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Sturmia minima is believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
